summary: Comprehensive UI testing of Jack — 3D Creator landing page (frontend-only static site). All 5 sections (Hero, Marquee, About, Services, Projects) render correctly with proper data-testid attributes, scroll-linked animations work as specified, and no console errors were observed during full top-to-bottom scroll.

issues: Project card images (Nextlevel Studio, Aura Brand Identity, Solaris Digital) are stock nature photos — sunflowers, mountains, lavender fields. For a '3D Creator portfolio' these should depict 3D renders, brand identities, or web design mocks. The current imagery does not match the project names/categories or the page's core 3D-creator theme. Recommend swapping to 3D-related assets.

action_items: Consider replacing ProjectsSection card images with 3D-render / branding / web-design themed visuals so they align with the portfolio narrative. (Minor — content relevance only; not blocking.)
critical_code_review_comments: MarqueeSection: scroll handler reads bounding rect on every scroll but does not throttle/rAF — fine at current scale but worth using requestAnimationFrame on heavier pages.

HeroSection nav anchors link to #about, #price, #projects, #contact but there is no element with id='contact' in the page — clicking 'Contact' nav link will not scroll anywhere. Either add an id='contact' anchor (e.g., on the bottom Contact button / footer) or make it a mailto link.

ProjectsSection ProjectCard sets className 'sticky top-24 md:top-32' AND inline style 'top: …px' — the inline style overrides the responsive Tailwind top values, so md breakpoint top is effectively lost. Pick one approach.
Multiple sections set backgroundColor inline on the section while index.css already sets body bg — fine, but redundant.
App.js imports use @/ alias — make sure jsconfig.json / craco config is in place (works currently, just flagging).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Page is fully working at https://jack-creator-dark-1.preview.emergentagent.com. All required data-testid selectors are present. Scroll-linked animations verified: marquee row-1 translateX moves +180 while row-2 moves -180 over 600px scroll (opposite directions). Project card 01 scale animates from 1.0 → 0.94 as user scrolls through projects. Magnet idle transform is matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0) (i.e., translate3d(0,0,0)) when mouse is away. 0 console errors. Only feedback item is content-relevance of project images.

verified_checklist.hero_heading_text_apostrophe_gradient: PASS — 'Hi, I'm jack' (curly apostrophe in JSX, uppercased via CSS) with -webkit-background-clip: text gradient
verified_checklist.marquee_two_rows_opposite_scroll: PASS — row1 delta +180px, row2 delta -180px over 600px scroll
verified_checklist.services_5_items: PASS — 01 3D Modeling, 02 Rendering, 03 Motion Design, 04 Branding, 05 Web Design
